questions.question: Which restaurants in Washington Dc are open on weekends?
questions.answer: Restaurants in Washington Dc with weekend hours include: Dunkin' (Sat: 05:00-19:00), Cafe Rio (Sat: 10:30-22:00), Villa Bella Italian Restaurant (Sat: 11:30-23:00), Einstein Bros. Bagels (Sat: 06:00-16:00), Subway (Sat: 09:00-21:30), Chopsticks Express (Sat: 11:00-21:30), McDonald's (Sat: 00:00 - 24:00), Domino's (Sat: 00:00-01:00, 10:00-00:00) and 2321 more. 2329 total with weekend availability.
